summary.en: Provision builds an AI estimator that flags risks and obligations in construction contracts, specs, and drawings.
summary.zh: Provision 打造 AI 估算工具，標示營建合約、規格與圖紙中的風險與義務。

highlight.en: By surfacing contractual risks across documents automatically, Provision cuts the review time contractors spend so they can focus on winning and delivering projects profitably.
highlight.zh: 透過自動找出文件中的合約風險，Provision 縮短承包商審閱文件的時間，讓他們專注於拿下並獲利交付專案。

summary.en: Thera is an AI-native suite of apps for running a modern business: global payroll, treasury, spend, and payments.
summary.zh: Thera 是一套 AI 原生的企業營運應用，涵蓋全球薪資、資金、支出管理與收付款。

highlight.en: Thera bundles global payroll, treasury, spend management, and invoicing into one ecosystem used by companies like Oceans, Zendrop, and Meru.
highlight.zh: Thera 將全球薪資、資金、支出管理與開票整合成單一生態系，獲 Oceans、Zendrop、Meru 等公司採用。

summary.en: Drip lets customers shop and pay in installments anywhere, combining credit-card features with Brazil's Pix network.
summary.zh: Drip 讓顧客在任何地方分期購物付款，結合信用卡功能與巴西的 Pix 網路。

highlight.en: Drip merges Pix's wide acceptance with credit and 2%+ cashback, letting shoppers pay almost anywhere Pix is taken, which covers 85%+ of e-commerce.
highlight.zh: Drip 結合 Pix 的廣泛接受度、信用額度與 2% 以上現金回饋，讓顧客在涵蓋逾 85% 電商的 Pix 通路消費付款。

summary.en: Wondercraft lets users create video through natural conversation with AI.
summary.zh: Wondercraft 讓使用者透過與 AI 自然對話來製作影片。

highlight.en: Wondercraft introduces "vibe creation," turning a back-and-forth chat into finished video so users can produce content without traditional editing tools.
highlight.zh: Wondercraft 提出「氛圍創作」概念，將來回對話轉成完成的影片，讓使用者免用傳統剪輯工具即可產出內容。

summary.en: Intuned is a code-first browser automation platform whose AI agent builds and maintains scrapers, RPAs, and crawlers.
summary.zh: Intuned 是程式碼優先的瀏覽器自動化平台，由 AI 代理建立並維護爬蟲、RPA 與抓取程式。

highlight.en: Intuned ships automations as production TypeScript or Python with stealth, CAPTCHA solving, proxies, and auth built in, and its agent self-heals runs when sites change.
highlight.zh: Intuned 以正式環境的 TypeScript 或 Python 交付自動化，內建隱身、CAPTCHA 破解、代理與驗證，且代理能在網站變動時自我修復。

summary.en: AccessOwl automates employee SaaS account provisioning and permissioning across any tool.
summary.zh: AccessOwl 自動化員工在各類工具上的 SaaS 帳號開通與權限管理。

highlight.en: AccessOwl tackles access management that startups now face like enterprises, with IT teams at Zeplin and Sary saving 30 minutes on every provisioning request.
highlight.zh: AccessOwl 解決新創如今面臨的企業級存取管理難題，Zeplin、Sary 等公司的 IT 團隊每筆開通請求可省下 30 分鐘。

summary.en: Pana offers a secure global USD account integrating fiat and stablecoins for direct-to-bank settlement across 125 countries.
summary.zh: Pana 提供安全的全球美元帳戶，整合法幣與穩定幣，於 125 國直接對銀行結算。

highlight.en: Pana settles cross-border payments directly to banks with no liquidity providers, SWIFT, or intermediaries, with both sender and receiver using its app and wallet.
highlight.zh: Pana 直接對銀行結算跨境支付，無需流動性提供商、SWIFT 或中介，收付雙方皆使用其 App 與錢包。

summary.en: Overwatch Data provides real-time AI agents for enterprise fraud, cyber, and security risk intelligence.
summary.zh: Overwatch Data 提供即時 AI 代理，用於企業詐欺、網路安全與風險情報。

highlight.en: Overwatch's agents automate threat intelligence and brand protection while running risk reviews at scale to detect fraud and financial crime.
highlight.zh: Overwatch 的代理自動化威脅情報與品牌保護，並大規模執行風險審查以偵測詐欺與金融犯罪。

summary.en: Diversion is a scalable, cloud-native version control system positioned as a Perforce and Git alternative.
summary.zh: Diversion 是可擴展的雲端原生版本控制系統，定位為 Perforce 與 Git 的替代方案。

highlight.en: Diversion brings GitHub-like version control to large files and complex projects for games, virtual production, animation, and 3D/VR, integrating with tools like Unreal Engine.
highlight.zh: Diversion 為遊戲、虛擬製作、動畫與 3D/VR 的大型檔案與複雜專案帶來類 GitHub 的版本控制，並與 Unreal Engine 等工具整合。

summary.en: Chowdeck is an on-demand food delivery service and restaurant marketplace for Africa, based in Lagos.
summary.zh: Chowdeck 是非洲的隨選餐點外送服務與餐廳市集，總部位於拉哥斯。

highlight.en: Chowdeck delivers meals from a wide range of restaurants in under 30 minutes and aims to help African restaurants grow their reach.
highlight.zh: Chowdeck 在 30 分鐘內從眾多餐廳外送餐點，並致力於協助非洲餐廳擴大觸及。

summary.en: Fini builds AI agents that autonomously resolve up to 80% of enterprise customer support tickets.
summary.zh: Fini 打造 AI 代理，可自主處理多達 80% 的企業客服工單。

highlight.en: Fini's agents take real actions like refunds and KYC checks, integrate with Zendesk and Salesforce, and help brands like Bitdefender cut support costs while raising CSAT.
highlight.zh: Fini 的代理可執行退款、KYC 等實際動作，整合 Zendesk 與 Salesforce，協助 Bitdefender 等品牌降低客服成本並提升 CSAT。

summary.en: Express Building finances Southeast Asia's pre-sold affordable housing pipeline for small and mid-sized developers.
summary.zh: Express Building 為東南亞中小型開發商的預售平價住宅供給管道提供融資。

highlight.en: Targeting a roughly $1 trillion housing backlog, Express Building helps developers scale affordable housing pipelines in Indonesia and the Philippines.
highlight.zh: 瞄準約一兆美元的住房缺口，Express Building 協助開發商在印尼與菲律賓擴大平價住宅供給管道。

summary.en: Polymath Robotics builds a general autonomy stack that lets any industrial vehicle drive itself.
summary.zh: Polymath Robotics 打造通用自駕技術堆疊，讓任何工業車輛自行駕駛。

highlight.en: Polymath bundles AI, ML, controls, ROS, and safety so customers can command automated vehicles, from tractors to bulldozers, through a single REST API.
highlight.zh: Polymath 整合 AI、ML、控制、ROS 與安全機制，讓客戶透過單一 REST API 指揮從曳引機到推土機的自動化車輛。

summary.en: Medplum is an open-source, API-first electronic health record platform for building compliant healthcare apps.
summary.zh: Medplum 是開源、API 優先的電子病歷平台，用於打造合規的醫療應用。

highlight.en: Medplum's open-source toolkit lets providers build HIPAA-compliant, SOC2-certified, FHIR-native apps that streamline payor connections and health system integrations.
highlight.zh: Medplum 的開源工具組讓醫療機構打造符合 HIPAA、SOC2 認證、FHIR 原生的應用，簡化支付方串接與醫療系統整合。

summary.en: Albiware is an all-in-one B2B SaaS platform for insurance damage repair contractors.
summary.zh: Albiware 是為保險災損修復承包商打造的一站式 B2B SaaS 平台。

highlight.en: Built by contractors for the $100B+ damage repair industry, Albi unifies CRM, project management, field documentation, scheduling, BI, and HR to reduce claims friction and speed payment.
highlight.zh: 由承包商為逾千億美元的災損修復產業打造，Albi 整合 CRM、專案管理、現場記錄、排程、BI 與人資，減少理賠摩擦並加快收款。

summary.en: SigmaMind AI is a voice AI platform purpose-built for contact centers, layered on top of existing phone systems.
summary.zh: SigmaMind AI 是專為客服中心打造的語音 AI 平台，疊加於既有電話系統之上。

highlight.en: SigmaMind's agents handle lead generation, appointment setting, collections, and intake at high volume, letting centers reach more people and cut cost per lead, with strong traction in insurance and home services.
highlight.zh: SigmaMind 的代理大量處理開發名單、預約、催收與接案，讓客服中心觸及更多人並降低每筆名單成本，於保險與居家服務領域成效顯著。

summary.en: Typewise is an AI-first customer service platform whose orchestrated agents resolve requests end-to-end across a company's stack.
summary.zh: Typewise 是 AI 優先的客服平台，由協同代理跨整個技術堆疊端到端處理請求。

highlight.en: Teams describe outcomes in plain language and Typewise compiles them into automations with no code, helping brands like Unilever and DPD cut support effort by 50%+ via 200+ integrations.
highlight.zh: 團隊以自然語言描述目標，Typewise 即免寫程式編成自動化，透過逾 200 項整合協助 Unilever、DPD 等品牌減少逾 50% 客服工作量。

summary.en: Shipmates is a shipping platform that lets Philippine online merchants book orders across multiple couriers in a few clicks.
summary.zh: Shipmates 是讓菲律賓網路商家數次點擊即可跨多家快遞下單的物流平台。

highlight.en: Shipmates connects to six couriers including Lalamove, Grab, and J&T, supports Shopify and Excel order uploads, and offers nationwide shipping, cash on delivery, and free pickups.
highlight.zh: Shipmates 串接 Lalamove、Grab、J&T 等六家快遞，支援 Shopify 與 Excel 上傳訂單，並提供全國配送、貨到付款與免費取件。

summary.en: Invofox is document-processing AI that lets software companies build services to extract data from invoices, receipts, and more.
summary.zh: Invofox 是文件處理 AI，讓軟體公司打造服務以擷取發票、收據等文件的資料。

highlight.en: With Invofox's technology, software companies can build a first-in-class document service for invoices, receipts, and bills of lading with minimal effort.
highlight.zh: 借助 Invofox 的技術，軟體公司能以極少心力為發票、收據與提單打造一流的文件處理服務。

summary.en: Layerup builds an autonomous Agentic AI operating system for large enterprises in financial services and insurance.
summary.zh: Layerup 為金融服務與保險業的大型企業打造自主的 Agentic AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Layerup orchestrates enterprise systems, from internal software and data infrastructure to ML models and on-prem apps, to deploy autonomous agents for end-to-end automation.
highlight.zh: Layerup 協調企業系統，從內部軟體、資料基礎設施到 ML 模型與地端應用，部署自主代理以實現端到端自動化。

summary.en: Tranch is an invoice-to-payments platform that helps enterprises optimize cash flow and offer clients flexible payment options.
summary.zh: Tranch 是發票到付款平台，協助企業優化現金流並為客戶提供彈性付款選項。

highlight.en: Operating from New York and London, Tranch lets services firms and software vendors get paid faster via Pay Now, card, crypto, and Pay Later of 2 to 12 months up to $1M.
highlight.zh: Tranch 以紐約與倫敦為據點，讓服務公司與軟體商透過即付、刷卡、加密貨幣及最高 100 萬美元、2 至 12 個月的後付方式更快收款。

summary.en: Illuminant Surgical builds a real-time anatomical projection system that gives doctors an x-ray-like view during procedures.
summary.zh: Illuminant Surgical 打造即時解剖投影系統，讓醫師在手術中獲得類似 X 光的視野。

highlight.en: Its Skylight platform projects images directly onto the patient, giving surgeons x-ray vision for safer interventions, billed as the first system of its kind.
highlight.zh: 其 Skylight 平台將影像直接投射到病人身上，讓外科醫師擁有 X 光透視以提升手術安全，號稱同類首創。

summary.en: Findly is a co-pilot for business intelligence that lets decision-makers explore company data through chat.
summary.zh: Findly 是商業智慧的副駕駛，讓決策者透過對話探索公司資料。

highlight.en: By integrating a metric layer that understands all company metrics, Findly turns chat into reports and visualizations, with scheduled chats and action-triggered automations.
highlight.zh: Findly 整合理解所有公司指標的指標層，將對話轉成報表與視覺化，並支援排程對話與動作觸發的自動化。

summary.en: PrimeVault is an all-in-one digital asset and stablecoin platform for enterprises and financial institutions.
summary.zh: PrimeVault 是為企業與金融機構打造的一站式數位資產與穩定幣平台。

highlight.en: PrimeVault combines secure wallets, programmable treasury, compliance, and market access in one modular solution so institutions can issue, manage, and move digital assets at scale.
highlight.zh: PrimeVault 將安全錢包、可程式化資金、合規與市場接取整合於一個模組化方案，讓機構大規模發行、管理與移轉數位資產。

summary.en: Pivo was a digital bank for freight carriers in Africa, starting with truck owners and drivers.
summary.zh: Pivo 是非洲貨運業者的數位銀行，從卡車車主與司機切入。

highlight.en: Pivo gave truck owners and drivers bank accounts, debit cards, and digital invoicing to get paid faster, planning to add credit, transaction, and expense management.
highlight.zh: Pivo 為卡車車主與司機提供銀行帳戶、簽帳卡與數位開票以加快收款，並計畫增加信貸、交易與支出管理。

summary.en: Magic was a pay-by-bank platform for payments, loyalty, and rewards.
summary.zh: Magic 是支援銀行帳戶付款的支付、忠誠與回饋平台。

highlight.en: Magic positioned itself as a next-generation platform unifying payments with loyalty and rewards programs.
highlight.zh: Magic 定位為新世代平台，將支付與忠誠及回饋計畫整合在一起。

summary.en: Julius is an AI data scientist that analyzes and visualizes large datasets and runs complex analysis.
summary.zh: Julius 是 AI 資料科學家，能分析與視覺化大型資料集並執行複雜分析。

highlight.en: Julius performs forecasting, regression, and even trains ML models on massive datasets, acting as an on-demand data scientist.
highlight.zh: Julius 可在大量資料上執行預測、迴歸，甚至訓練 ML 模型，扮演隨選的資料科學家。

summary.en: Birch Biosciences engineers enzymes that recycle plastic, using synthetic biology and machine learning.
summary.zh: Birch Biosciences 運用合成生物學與機器學習，設計可回收塑膠的酵素。

highlight.en: Its enzyme "molecular scissors" break plastic polymers into chemical building blocks for new products, in a process designed to cut carbon emissions by 70% toward a circular plastic economy.
highlight.zh: 其酵素「分子剪刀」將塑膠聚合物分解為可製成新產品的化學基材，此製程旨在減少 70% 碳排放，邁向循環塑膠經濟。

summary.en: CustomerOS uncovered high-fit leads already engaging with a brand but not yet in the sales funnel.
summary.zh: CustomerOS 找出已與品牌互動但尚未進入銷售漏斗的高契合度名單。

highlight.en: By scoring pipeline against a company's ICP, CustomerOS built data-driven profiles of best customers and flagged ICP-fit in real time to avoid wasting CAC on low-value leads.
highlight.zh: CustomerOS 依公司的理想客戶輪廓為潛在客戶評分，建立最佳客戶的資料驅動樣貌並即時標示契合度，避免將獲客成本浪費在低價值名單上。

summary.en: Craze picks and combines the right AI models, apps, and agents to actually get tasks done for you.
summary.zh: Craze 挑選並結合合適的 AI 模型、應用與代理，真正替你完成任務。

highlight.en: Rather than just chatting, Craze executes tasks like running marketing campaigns, hiring, building AI coworkers, and automating workflows by orchestrating the right tools.
highlight.zh: Craze 不只對話，而是透過協調合適的工具來執行任務，例如執行行銷活動、招募、建立 AI 同事與自動化工作流程。

summary.en: Disclo is a HIPAA- and SOC2-compliant platform for employers to collect, verify, and manage health disclosures and accommodation requests.
summary.zh: Disclo 是符合 HIPAA 與 SOC2 的平台，供雇主收集、驗證與管理健康揭露及調適請求。

highlight.en: Using a patent-pending verification system that interacts with medical providers directly, Disclo lets employees secure accommodations without disclosing their condition while keeping HR compliant with EEOC and ADA rules.
highlight.zh: Disclo 採用專利申請中的驗證系統直接與醫療提供者互動，讓員工無須揭露病況即可取得調適，同時協助人資符合 EEOC 與 ADA 規範。

summary.en: ALT TEX makes biodegradable, carbon-neutral textiles engineered from food waste.
summary.zh: ALT TEX 以食物廢棄物製造可生物分解、碳中和的紡織品。

highlight.en: ALT TEX's patent-pending fermentation technology turns food waste into a polyester alternative that works with existing infrastructure, targeting the 60% of the fashion industry that polyester represents.
highlight.zh: ALT TEX 專利申請中的發酵技術將食物廢棄物轉成可相容於現有產線的聚酯替代品，瞄準佔時尚產業 60% 的聚酯市場。

summary.en: CodeCrafters offers programming courses where experienced engineers rebuild tools like Git, Redis, and SQLite.
summary.zh: CodeCrafters 提供程式設計課程，讓資深工程師重建 Git、Redis、SQLite 等工具。

highlight.en: CodeCrafters has engineers build their own Git, Redis, or SQLite in languages such as Go, Rust, and Python, learning through hands-on reconstruction.
highlight.zh: CodeCrafters 讓工程師以 Go、Rust、Python 等語言親手打造自己的 Git、Redis 或 SQLite，透過動手重建來學習。

summary.en: Activepieces is an open-source, AI-first, no-code business automation tool.
summary.zh: Activepieces 是開源、AI 優先的無程式碼商業自動化工具。

highlight.en: MIT-licensed Activepieces lets users build automations such as triggering email and Slack notifications when new contacts are added to a HubSpot CRM.
highlight.zh: 採 MIT 授權的 Activepieces 讓使用者建立自動化，例如在 HubSpot CRM 新增聯絡人時觸發 Email 與 Slack 通知。

summary.en: Rio is a stablecoin FX and liquidity provider for the Latin American market.
summary.zh: Rio 是拉丁美洲市場的穩定幣外匯與流動性提供商。

highlight.en: Rio enables financial innovators to access stablecoins and scale their products, positioning itself as the premier stablecoin liquidity provider in LATAM.
highlight.zh: Rio 讓金融創新者取得穩定幣並擴展產品，定位為拉美首屈一指的穩定幣流動性提供商。

summary.en: Tank Payments builds modern financial infrastructure for the trucking industry.
summary.zh: Tank Payments 為貨運業打造現代金融基礎設施。

highlight.en: Tank offers payables automation for logistics firms making hundreds of daily payments and a banking platform tailored to trucking businesses' financial needs.
highlight.zh: Tank 為每日進行數百筆付款的物流公司提供應付帳款自動化，並打造符合貨運業財務需求的銀行平台。

summary.en: Coris is an AI platform for payments risk and operations serving processors, banks, and SaaS companies.
summary.zh: Coris 是服務支付處理商、銀行與 SaaS 公司的 AI 支付風險與營運平台。

highlight.en: Coris automates merchant onboarding, monitoring, and payment operations for companies like GoFundMe, Kajabi, and Clio using its risk platform and AI agents.
highlight.zh: Coris 運用其風險平台與 AI 代理，為 GoFundMe、Kajabi、Clio 等公司自動化商戶開通、監控與支付營運。

summary.en: AviaryAI provides outbound AI voice agents for banks, credit unions, and insurance companies.
summary.zh: AviaryAI 為銀行、信用合作社與保險公司提供外撥 AI 語音代理。

highlight.en: Billed as the industry's first outbound AI service team and powered by a private LLM, AviaryAI helps providers make proactive calls while meeting strict regulatory and compliance standards.
highlight.zh: AviaryAI 號稱業界首個外撥 AI 服務團隊，由私有 LLM 驅動，協助業者主動致電並符合嚴格的法規與合規標準。

summary.en: Lamin is an open data lakehouse for biology to query, trace, and validate datasets and models at scale.
summary.zh: Lamin 是生物領域的開放資料湖倉，可大規模查詢、追溯與驗證資料集與模型。

highlight.en: Lamin offers one API for a lakehouse, lineage, feature store, ontologies, bio-registries, and formats, automating context for both AI agents and humans.
highlight.zh: Lamin 以單一 API 提供資料湖倉、血緣、特徵庫、本體、生物登錄與格式，為 AI 代理與人類自動化提供背景脈絡。

summary.en: Aldara is a modern HOA manager that automates back-office and operations with AI.
summary.zh: Aldara 是現代化的社區管委會管理工具，以 AI 自動化後勤與營運。

highlight.en: Aldara runs homeowners associations more efficiently by automating back-office and operational tasks with its in-house, AI-powered technology.
highlight.zh: Aldara 透過自研的 AI 技術自動化後勤與營運任務，更高效地經營社區管委會。

summary.en: Axle is an AI-native clearinghouse for property and casualty insurance.
summary.zh: Axle 是產險與意外險的 AI 原生清算中心。

highlight.en: Axle's infrastructure and agents automate insurance verification, monitoring, and policy updates, helping firms like Rocket Mortgage and Avis speed workflows by 95% and recover over $220M.
highlight.zh: Axle 的基礎設施與代理自動化保險核驗、監控與保單更新，協助 Rocket Mortgage、Avis 等公司加速 95% 流程並追回逾 2.2 億美元。

summary.en: Namecard.ai uses generative AI to match businesses with the right people to help them grow.
summary.zh: Namecard.ai 運用生成式 AI，為企業媒合能助其成長的合適人脈。

highlight.en: Namecard.ai analyzes a business's goals, challenges, and strengths to connect it with people who can catalyze growth, replacing chance networking.
highlight.zh: Namecard.ai 分析企業的目標、挑戰與優勢，將其連結至能催化成長的人脈，取代靠運氣的人脈拓展。

summary.en: Zoltar Labs is an AI-assisted customer experience tool built with your own knowledge.
summary.zh: Zoltar Labs 是以你自身知識打造的 AI 輔助客戶體驗工具。

highlight.en: Zoltar Labs builds AI-assisted CX tooling grounded in a company's own knowledge so support draws on accurate, internal information.
highlight.zh: Zoltar Labs 打造以公司自身知識為基礎的 AI 輔助客戶體驗工具，讓客服得以運用準確的內部資訊。

summary.en: Trendex is a fan engagement platform that partners with athletes and celebrities to create official digital fan passes.
summary.zh: Trendex 是粉絲互動平台，與運動員及名人合作推出官方數位粉絲通行證。

highlight.en: Trendex turns official fan passes into IRL rewards like signed memorabilia and meet-and-greets plus automated, personalized fan journeys at scale.
highlight.zh: Trendex 將官方粉絲通行證轉化為簽名紀念品、見面會等實體回饋，並大規模提供自動化、個人化的粉絲體驗旅程。

summary.en: Emerge Career is an all-in-one re-entry and workforce development training platform for government agencies.
summary.zh: Emerge Career 是為政府機構打造的一站式更生與勞動力發展培訓平台。

highlight.en: Emerge Career pairs vocational training with workforce management software to help agencies create high-paying jobs and up-skill low-income and justice-involved citizens out of poverty.
highlight.zh: Emerge Career 結合職業培訓與勞動力管理軟體，協助機構創造高薪工作，並讓低收入及涉司法公民提升技能脫離貧困。

summary.en: SilkChart is an AI sales assistant that analyzes calls to boost playbook adoption and win more deals.
summary.zh: SilkChart 是 AI 銷售助理，分析通話以提升銷售腳本採用率並贏得更多交易。

highlight.en: SilkChart measures how well playbooks are executed on sales calls, surfacing coaching opportunities to managers and giving reps actionable feedback to close deals.
highlight.zh: SilkChart 衡量銷售通話中腳本的執行成效，為主管揭示輔導機會，並給業務可行的回饋以成交。

summary.en: Coupl is a digital zero-balance joint account designed for Indian couples and households.
summary.zh: Coupl 是為印度伴侶與家庭設計的數位零餘額聯名帳戶。

highlight.en: Set up in 60 seconds with co-branded debit cards and in-app bill payments, Coupl targets a $300B household-expenses market driven by the 20M+ Indians who marry yearly.
highlight.zh: Coupl 可於 60 秒開通，附聯名簽帳卡與 App 內帳單支付，瞄準由每年逾 2,000 萬印度人結婚帶動的 3,000 億美元家庭支出市場。

summary.en: Integration Labs offered a unified API for business financial data across accounting, commerce, and payments platforms.
summary.zh: Integration Labs 提供統一 API，串接會計、商務與支付平台的企業財務資料。

highlight.en: With one integration, B2B companies could connect to 30+ accounting, payments, and e-commerce systems to build tools for invoice financing, lending, and AP/AR reconciliation.
highlight.zh: B2B 公司只需整合一次，即可連接 30 多個會計、支付與電商系統，打造發票融資、放貸與應收應付對帳等工具。

summary.en: Delegasi provided automated accounting services and financial statements for small businesses in Indonesia.
summary.zh: Delegasi 為印尼小型企業提供自動化會計服務與財務報表。

highlight.en: Billed as Indonesia's first virtual financial manager, Delegasi let SMB owners simply upload receipts and bank statements to receive financial statements and business analyses.
highlight.zh: Delegasi 號稱印尼首位虛擬財務經理，讓中小企業主只需上傳收據與銀行對帳單，即可取得財務報表與營運分析。

summary.en: Feather is a voice AI platform powering human-like phone calls at AI speed.
summary.zh: Feather 是語音 AI 平台，以 AI 速度驅動擬真的電話通話。

highlight.en: Feather provides the platform that powers human-like phone calls handled by AI, combining natural conversation with machine speed.
highlight.zh: Feather 提供驅動由 AI 處理之擬真電話通話的平台，將自然對話與機器速度結合。

summary.en: Anchor is an embedded finance platform providing APIs and tools for African businesses to build banking products.
summary.zh: Anchor 是嵌入式金融平台，為非洲企業提供打造銀行產品的 API 與工具。

highlight.en: Anchor offers APIs for bank accounts, transfers, savings, card issuing, and loans, plus regulatory coverage and ongoing compliance support for partners.
highlight.zh: Anchor 提供開戶、轉帳、儲蓄、發卡與放貸的 API，並為合作夥伴提供法規覆蓋與持續的合規支援。

summary.en: Levers is accounts-receivable management SaaS that helps B2B companies collect faster and boost cash flow.
summary.zh: Levers 是應收帳款管理 SaaS，協助 B2B 公司更快收款並提升現金流。

highlight.en: Levers integrates with accounting systems and streamlines AR with personalized reminders, cross-team collaboration tools, and collection performance analytics.
highlight.zh: Levers 整合會計系統，透過個人化催款提醒、跨團隊協作工具與催收成效分析，簡化應收帳款流程。

summary.en: Almond made it easy to get ObGyn care in-person and over telehealth, like One Medical for women's health.
summary.zh: Almond 讓人輕鬆透過實體門診與遠距醫療取得婦產科照護，如同女性健康版的 One Medical。

highlight.en: Almond rebuilt back-office tech to save physician time and hired a wider range of care provider roles, aiming to deliver better outcomes and resolve patient issues faster.
highlight.zh: Almond 重建後勤技術以節省醫師時間，並聘用更廣泛的照護人員角色，力求帶來更好的成效並更快解決病患問題。

summary.en: Drahim is a personal finance app for Saudi Arabia and the Middle East, positioned as a Wealthfront for the region.
summary.zh: Drahim 是沙烏地阿拉伯與中東的個人理財 App，定位為該地區的 Wealthfront。

highlight.en: Drahim integrates with banks to auto-categorize transactions, spot spending patterns, and suggest saving and investing plans that let users keep spending comfortably.
highlight.zh: Drahim 串接銀行以自動分類交易、找出消費模式，並提出讓使用者得以安心消費的儲蓄與投資計畫。

summary.en: Cone is an AI-powered work operating system for professional service businesses, unifying accounting workflows.
summary.zh: Cone 是為專業服務企業打造的 AI 工作作業系統，整合會計工作流程。

highlight.en: Cone brings proposals, tasks, billing, payments, and client engagement into one platform for accounting and professional service firms.
highlight.zh: Cone 將提案、任務、開票、付款與客戶互動整合到一個平台，服務會計與專業服務公司。

summary.en: Roxels is a vision-enabled voice agent that handles complex flows for users at scale.
summary.zh: Roxels 是具視覺能力的語音代理，能大規模為使用者處理複雜流程。

highlight.en: Roxels delivers founder-level, high-touch onboarding to every customer, not just the first few, by guiding them through complex flows with a vision-enabled voice agent.
highlight.zh: Roxels 透過具視覺能力的語音代理引導複雜流程，將創辦人等級的高接觸引導體驗帶給每位顧客，而非只有最初幾位。

summary.en: Windmill is an open-source platform that turns scripts into internal tools, workflows, and full-stack apps.
summary.zh: Windmill 是開源平台，將腳本轉成內部工具、工作流程與全端應用。

highlight.en: Windmill auto-generates UIs from script parameters in Python, TypeScript, Go, and more, handling dependencies, scheduling, and secrets as an open-source alternative to Airflow, Temporal, Retool, and n8n.
highlight.zh: Windmill 依 Python、TypeScript、Go 等腳本參數自動產生 UI，並處理相依、排程與密鑰，是 Airflow、Temporal、Retool 與 n8n 的開源替代方案。

summary.en: FlyCode helps subscription merchants recover failed payments to reduce involuntary churn and increase LTV.
summary.zh: FlyCode 協助訂閱商家挽回失敗付款，降低非自願流失並提升顧客終身價值。

highlight.en: FlyCode tackles involuntary churn, the revenue lost when payments fail rather than customers cancelling, by managing payment failures intelligently for SaaS and B2C subscriptions.
highlight.zh: FlyCode 透過智慧管理付款失敗，解決非自願流失，即因付款失敗而非顧客取消所損失的營收，服務 SaaS 與 B2C 訂閱業務。

summary.en: Unthread is an AI-powered helpdesk built natively into Slack to automate support operations.
summary.zh: Unthread 是原生內建於 Slack 的 AI 客服中心，自動化客服營運。

highlight.en: Unthread automates ticket creation and resolution directly from Slack channels, helping IT, HR, and CX teams at large companies resolve tickets instantly with AI.
highlight.zh: Unthread 直接從 Slack 頻道自動化工單建立與處理，協助大型公司的 IT、人資與客戶體驗團隊以 AI 即時解決工單。

summary.en: Vinci Games creates genre-defining social multiplayer VR games.
summary.zh: Vinci Games 打造定義類型的社交多人 VR 遊戲。

highlight.en: Its first title Blacktop Hoops became a top-rated Meta Quest sports game, and its second, Ruffnauts, hit 30K+ reviews at 4.9 stars in its first month of Alpha Early Access.
highlight.zh: 其首款作品 Blacktop Hoops 成為 Meta Quest 上評價最高的運動遊戲之一，第二款 Ruffnauts 在搶先體驗首月即累積逾 3 萬則 4.9 星評論。

summary.en: Relate is an all-in-one sales and marketing CRM platform for B2B teams.
summary.zh: Relate 是為 B2B 團隊打造的一站式銷售與行銷 CRM 平台。

highlight.en: Relate offers a modern, unified CRM that brings sales and marketing together for B2B companies.
highlight.zh: Relate 提供現代化的整合 CRM，將銷售與行銷結合，服務 B2B 公司。

summary.en: Superbar is sales AI for websites that answers visitor questions and drives conversions around the clock.
summary.zh: Superbar 是網站用的銷售 AI，全天候回答訪客問題並驅動轉換。

highlight.en: Superbar acts like a top salesperson on every page, instantly answering questions and driving conversions 24/7.
highlight.zh: Superbar 如同每個頁面上的頂尖業務，即時回答問題並全天候驅動轉換。

summary.en: Sonnet was an end-to-end meeting assistant combining a human-quality notetaker with an auto-updating CRM.
summary.zh: Sonnet 是端到端的會議助理，結合媲美人類的會議記錄與自動更新的 CRM。

highlight.en: Sonnet transcribed, summarized, and generated meeting notes, and kept its CRM current automatically from conversation data so teams never had to wrangle CRM fields.
highlight.zh: Sonnet 轉錄、摘要並產生會議記錄，並依對話資料自動更新 CRM，讓團隊無須再費心整理 CRM 欄位。

summary.en: TrueBiz provides instant background checks on businesses to reduce manual review during onboarding.
summary.zh: TrueBiz 提供企業的即時背景查核，減少開通過程中的人工審查。

highlight.en: TrueBiz enriches a company's background with 250+ web data points and summarizes key risk indicators in seconds, letting financial service providers onboard businesses faster.
highlight.zh: TrueBiz 以逾 250 個網路資料點豐富企業背景，並在數秒內彙整關鍵風險指標，讓金融服務商更快完成企業開通。

summary.en: Serinus Biosciences designs combination cancer therapies using an explainable AI platform to override treatment resistance.
summary.zh: Serinus Biosciences 運用可解釋的 AI 平台設計組合癌症療法，以克服治療抗藥性。

highlight.en: Founded by MIT PhDs, Serinus's AI engine, primed with systems biology, uncovers how cancer cells evolve resistance and identifies molecules to design safer, more effective combinations.
highlight.zh: Serinus 由 MIT 博士創立，其以系統生物學為基礎的 AI 引擎找出癌細胞演化抗藥性的方式，並辨識分子以設計更安全、有效的組合療法。

summary.en: NuMind is a tool that lets data scientists, analysts, and engineers create custom NLP models.
summary.zh: NuMind 是讓資料科學家、分析師與工程師建立客製 NLP 模型的工具。

highlight.en: Built by a former Wolfram Research ML head, NuMind leverages large language models like GPT-3 to complete NLP projects at least 10x faster, with use cases such as matching resumes to job offers.
highlight.zh: NuMind 由前 Wolfram Research 機器學習主管打造，運用 GPT-3 等大型語言模型，使 NLP 專案至少加速 10 倍，應用如媒合履歷與職缺。

summary.en: Sunlight is a universal card-on-file API that helps fintechs make their cards top-of-wallet.
summary.zh: Sunlight 是通用的「卡片存檔」API，協助金融科技讓自家卡片成為首選支付卡。

highlight.en: Sunlight lets fintechs automatically become the card on file across apps and subscription services as soon as their cards are issued, easing the hurdle of updating payment info.
highlight.zh: Sunlight 讓金融科技在發卡後立即自動成為各應用與訂閱服務的存檔卡片，減輕更新付款資訊的麻煩。

summary.en: Cashboard is building tooling to enable the solo CFO.
summary.zh: Cashboard 正打造讓「單人財務長」成真的工具。

highlight.en: Cashboard aims to let a single finance leader operate as a full CFO, consolidating financial oversight into one person's workflow.
highlight.zh: Cashboard 力求讓單一財務主管以完整財務長之姿運作，將財務監管整合到一人的工作流程中。

summary.en: Ten Lives uses AI to optimize microbial factories that manufacture proteins at low cost and environmental impact.
summary.zh: Ten Lives 運用 AI 優化微生物工廠，以低成本與低環境衝擊製造蛋白質。

highlight.en: Ten Lives aims to make sustainable protein a cost-viable alternative for the whole family, including pets, by optimizing microbial production.
highlight.zh: Ten Lives 透過優化微生物生產，力求讓永續蛋白質成為具成本效益的選擇，惠及包含寵物在內的全家人。

summary.en: Flair Labs is an AI communications platform for lending, letting teams build autonomous agents across voice and text.
summary.zh: Flair Labs 是放貸業的 AI 通訊平台，讓團隊跨語音與文字打造自主代理。

highlight.en: Flair's agent platform lets lending teams execute complex workflows via voice and text, betting that top teams will soon manage swarms of agents acting on their behalf.
highlight.zh: Flair 的代理平台讓放貸團隊透過語音與文字執行複雜流程，押注頂尖團隊很快將管理代表他們行動的大批代理。

summary.en: Airhart Aeronautics is building semi-autonomous airplanes that anyone can fly.
summary.zh: Airhart Aeronautics 正打造任何人都能駕駛的半自動飛機。

highlight.en: Airhart's semi-autonomous technology aims to let 10x more people fly their own planes, making a trip to Tahoe as easy as driving to the grocery store.
highlight.zh: Airhart 的半自動技術力求讓駕駛自有飛機的人數增加十倍，把飛往 Tahoe 變得像開車去雜貨店一樣簡單。

summary.en: Monterey AI turns user feedback into product insights to boost engagement and reduce churn.
summary.zh: Monterey AI 將使用者回饋轉化為產品洞察，以提升參與度並降低流失。

highlight.en: Monterey AI sets up feedback channels and auto-collects and analyzes qualitative and quantitative data from multiple sources to tell companies what actions to take.
highlight.zh: Monterey AI 建立回饋管道，自動收集並分析來自多個來源的質化與量化資料，告訴公司該採取哪些行動。

summary.en: Taro is a community of 150k+ software engineers and a platform that helps high-growth tech companies hire strong engineers.
summary.zh: Taro 是擁有逾 15 萬名軟體工程師的社群，也是協助高成長科技公司招募優秀工程師的平台。

highlight.en: Taro's education platform offers courses and discussions with leaders at top tech companies, attracting top engineers and supporting startup hiring through sourcing and candidate feedback.
highlight.zh: Taro 的教育平台提供與頂尖科技公司領導者的課程與討論，吸引優秀工程師，並透過尋才與候選人回饋支援新創招募。

summary.en: Morf Health is an integration platform that syncs patient data and automates workflows across healthcare providers' tools.
summary.zh: Morf Health 是整合平台，跨醫療機構的工具同步病患資料並自動化工作流程。

highlight.en: Like Segment plus Zapier for healthcare, Morf can create EHR records and trigger insurance eligibility checks when a patient submits an intake form.
highlight.zh: Morf 如同醫療版的 Segment 加 Zapier，能在病患送出初診表單時建立 EHR 紀錄並觸發保險資格查核。

summary.en: Wolfia helps security, legal, and sales teams answer customer questions in seconds without relying on subject-matter experts.
summary.zh: Wolfia 協助安全、法務與銷售團隊在數秒內回答客戶問題，無須仰賴主題專家。

highlight.en: Wolfia's AI agent connects to sources like Google Drive, Notion, Slack, and SOC 2 docs, keeps the knowledge graph fresh, and drafts responses to questionnaires and RFPs for teams to review.
highlight.zh: Wolfia 的 AI 代理連接 Google Drive、Notion、Slack 與 SOC 2 文件等來源，持續更新知識圖譜，並草擬問卷與 RFP 回覆供團隊審閱。

summary.en: Airtrain AI was a no-code data platform for curating, evaluating, and fine-tuning large language models.
summary.zh: Airtrain AI 是無程式碼資料平台，用於整理、評估與微調大型語言模型。

highlight.en: Airtrain let AI practitioners explore alternatives to costly proprietary models like GPT-4 by building datasets, evaluating, fine-tuning, and serving a wide selection of open-source LLMs.
highlight.zh: Airtrain 讓 AI 從業者透過建立資料集、評估、微調與部署多種開源 LLM，探索 GPT-4 等昂貴專有模型的替代方案。

summary.en: Ciro is a GTM AI agent that finds prospects, researches buying signals, and drafts personalized outreach from Slack.
summary.zh: Ciro 是進入市場的 AI 代理，從 Slack 找出潛在客戶、研究購買訊號並草擬個人化開發訊息。

highlight.en: Tell Ciro who you sell to and it finds the right people, figures out why now is the right time, and writes outreach that reads like a top rep did 30 minutes of research.
highlight.zh: 告訴 Ciro 你的銷售對象，它便找出合適人選、判斷為何此刻是最佳時機，並撰寫宛如頂尖業務做了 30 分鐘研究的開發訊息。

summary.en: erad provides non-dilutive growth capital and payments to startups in the Middle East.
summary.zh: erad 為中東新創提供非稀釋性的成長資金與支付服務。

highlight.en: Startups connect their sales, marketing, and banking data to erad and receive a funding offer within 48 hours, along with insights and analysis about their business.
highlight.zh: 新創將銷售、行銷與銀行資料連接到 erad，48 小時內即收到融資提案，並獲得關於自身業務的洞察與分析。

summary.en: Signatur Biosciences makes precision diagnostics more accessible, starting with breast cancer prognosis.
summary.zh: Signatur Biosciences 讓精準診斷更普及，從乳癌預後切入。

highlight.en: Signatur's tests can be run by local hospital labs, cutting breast cancer prognosis turnaround from over three weeks to a few days at a fraction of the cost of centralized facilities.
highlight.zh: Signatur 的檢測可由地方醫院實驗室執行，將乳癌預後的週轉時間從逾三週縮短至數天，且成本僅為集中式設施的一小部分。

summary.en: Voltic builds US-made electric cargo ships that it says are 4x more profitable than diesel vessels.
summary.zh: Voltic 打造美國製的電動貨船，宣稱獲利能力是柴油船的 4 倍。

highlight.en: With $100M+ in sales to customers including the largest US shipping company, Voltic uses a patented battery and solar stack spun out of MIT's Ocean Engineering department, targeting first deployment in early 2026.
highlight.zh: Voltic 已對含全美最大航運公司在內的客戶取得逾 1 億美元銷售，採用自 MIT 海洋工程系衍生的專利電池與太陽能技術，目標於 2026 年初首次商用部署。

summary.en: Bridgecard was a card issuer for Africa, letting fintechs issue Mastercard or Visa cards via easy-to-integrate APIs.
summary.zh: Bridgecard 是非洲的發卡服務商，讓金融科技透過易於整合的 API 發行 Mastercard 或 Visa 卡。

highlight.en: Bridgecard's APIs let fintechs issue virtual and physical cards usable worldwide in weeks instead of months, with over 50% of clients growing volumes 5X+ within six months.
highlight.zh: Bridgecard 的 API 讓金融科技在數週而非數月內發行可全球使用的虛擬與實體卡，逾半客戶在六個月內交易量成長逾 5 倍。

summary.en: Capix provides AI-powered private equity intelligence by aggregating and enriching firm data into one platform.
summary.zh: Capix 透過彙整並豐富機構資料於單一平台，提供 AI 驅動的私募股權情報。

highlight.en: Capix makes finding private equity firms fast and accurate by aggregating and enriching data from multiple sources into one customizable platform.
highlight.zh: Capix 將多個來源的資料彙整並豐富到一個可客製化的平台，使尋找私募股權機構既快速又精準。

summary.en: Ordinary Seafood made plant-based, sustainable seafood, doing for seafood what Impossible did for meat.
summary.zh: Ordinary Seafood 製作植物性、永續的海鮮，為海鮮做了 Impossible 為肉類所做的事。

highlight.en: This consumer biotech used plant protein and biotechnology to deliver next-generation sustainable seafood, helping people make greener food choices.
highlight.zh: 這家面向消費者的生技公司運用植物蛋白與生物技術，提供新世代永續海鮮，協助人們做出更環保的飲食選擇。

summary.en: BiggerPicture is a B2B SaaS platform that automates scheduling of pick-up and delivery times between trucking and warehousing.
summary.zh: BiggerPicture 是 B2B SaaS 平台，自動化貨運與倉儲間取貨與配送時間的排程。

highlight.en: BiggerPicture replaces the phone calls and emails still used to schedule 75% of shipments, automating appointment times between trucking companies and warehouses.
highlight.zh: BiggerPicture 取代至今仍用於排程 75% 出貨的電話與電郵，自動化貨運公司與倉庫之間的預約時間。

summary.en: Slidely AI creates and improves professional PowerPoint presentations with AI that works natively inside PowerPoint.
summary.zh: Slidely AI 以原生於 PowerPoint 內運作的 AI，建立並改善專業簡報。

highlight.en: With native PPTX support, Slidely AI rewrites and redesigns existing decks, placing each shape individually and learning a company's colors, fonts, and templates to stay on-brand.
highlight.zh: Slidely AI 原生支援 PPTX，可改寫並重新設計既有簡報，逐一擺放每個圖形，並學習公司的色彩、字體與範本以維持品牌一致性。

summary.en: Maya Labs is an applied research lab building self-programming machines.
summary.zh: Maya Labs 是打造自我編程機器的應用研究實驗室。

highlight.en: Maya Labs is on a mission to build machines that can program themselves to perform any task.
highlight.zh: Maya Labs 的使命是打造能自我編程以執行任何任務的機器。

summary.en: Rima AI automates document and spreadsheet work for accountants with cell-level audit tracking.
summary.zh: Rima AI 為會計師自動化文件與試算表工作，並提供儲存格層級的稽核追蹤。

highlight.en: Accountants describe workflows in natural language to extract data from PDFs or ERPs into Excel templates and reconcile spreadsheets in minutes, with Rima's agents preserving their know-how going forward.
highlight.zh: 會計師以自然語言描述工作流程，從 PDF 或 ERP 擷取資料填入 Excel 範本並於數分鐘內對帳，Rima 的代理日後並保留其專業知識。

summary.en: Relay Health is an app to quit porn, using private anonymous groups for accountability and community.
summary.zh: Relay Health 是戒除色情成癮的 App，運用私密匿名群組提供問責與社群支持。

highlight.en: Relay places members in small, confidential teams that replace isolation with connection, offering shame-free accountability, evidence-based tools, and daily reflection.
highlight.zh: Relay 將成員分入小型且保密的團隊，以連結取代孤立，提供無羞辱的問責、實證工具與每日反思。

summary.en: Sanifu automates the repetitive work that teams currently rely on spreadsheets for.
summary.zh: Sanifu 自動化團隊目前仰賴試算表處理的重複性工作。

highlight.en: Teams describe repetitive tasks like data cleanup, record matching, reconciliations, and report consolidation, and Sanifu captures the steps and rules to repeat them reliably, replacing the spreadsheet while keeping its logic.
highlight.zh: 團隊描述資料清理、紀錄比對、對帳與報表彙整等重複工作，Sanifu 擷取步驟與規則以可靠重複執行，在保留邏輯的同時取代試算表。

summary.en: Avina is a GTM signals engine that uses AI agents to find ready-to-buy prospects and automate warm outbound.
summary.zh: Avina 是進入市場的訊號引擎，運用 AI 代理找出準備購買的潛在客戶並自動化溫熱開發。

highlight.en: Avina finds prospects ready to buy, surfaces the warmest ones to your team, and automates outreach to the rest, comparable to tools like Unify or Common Room.
highlight.zh: Avina 找出準備購買的潛在客戶，將最溫熱者交給團隊，並自動化對其餘客戶的開發，可與 Unify 或 Common Room 等工具相比。
